{{CargoRelic
|name=Hannibal's Cup
|rank=AA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-04
|source=Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%)
|description=On Jul 4, 182 BC, Hannibal, a famous general of Carthage, drank the poison and died.

After the defeat of the Second Punic War, Hannibal fled his hometown. Out of desperation, he took poison and killed himself in a foreign land. Before his death, he looked back on his life with a myriad of emotions. He thought of when he raised a wine glass and spoke vigorously, "If you can't make his soul surrender, then break the vessel of his soul!" Many years later when Rome defeated Carthage, Hannibal picked up the glass again. But this time, it contained the poisonous wine instead.
|fame=69
|art=43
|fth=36
|civ=45
|tech=35
|ss1=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +4<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -1.2%
|ss2=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +8<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -1.8% 
|ss3=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +12<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -2.4% 
|ss4=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +20<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -3.6%
|ss5=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +28<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -4.8%
|ss7=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +28<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -4.8%<br>Zombie Gene Research B-tad Cost -4.2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Lumbercamp skill II.png|50px]] Place in Lumber Camp: Lumber Max Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Lumbercamp skill II.png|50px]] Place in Lumber Camp: Find Ancient Wood by +15%
}}

[[Category:Zombie Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Gene Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Wood Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Power Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Power]]
[[Category:Koryeon Snail Boost]]
[[Category:Baby Bud Boost]]
